summary: Iteration 46: Tested Zen Garden bug fix (PLANT_STAGES/PLANT_WATERS_PER_STAGE constants restored), Star Chart constellation-meditation integration, and Meditation page constellation query param. All backend tests passed (13/13). Frontend tests verified Zen Garden Plant Garden tab, watering functionality, Cosmic Meditations mode, and Guided Meditations regression.

integration_issues.issue: Clicking on 3D star chart canvas doesn't reliably select constellations - requires precise clicks on small star sprites. The Meditate button code exists and is correct (data-testid='constellation-meditate-btn'), but couldn't verify via automated testing due to 3D raycasting precision requirements.

action_items: Star Chart Meditate button code is correct but couldn't be verified via automated testing - manual testing recommended to click directly on constellation stars

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all features working, Star Chart constellation selection requires manual testing)

seed_data_creation: Test user has 6 plants (lotus, bamboo, bonsai, fern, lotus, sage)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Zen Garden bug fix verified - PLANT_STAGES and PLANT_WATERS_PER_STAGE constants are working. Plant creation, watering, and 'Already watered today' validation all working. Constellation-meditation integration code is correct in StarChart.js (lines 1008-1013) - Meditate button navigates to /meditation?constellation={id}. Meditation page correctly auto-switches to Cosmic Meditations mode when constellation query param is present. All 12 constellation themes returned from API.

zen_garden_bug_fix.GET /api/zen-garden/plants: PASS - returns plants with stage, watered_today, water_count fields
zen_garden_bug_fix.Frontend Plant Garden tab: PASS - shows 6 plants with Water Plant/Watered Today buttons

constellation_meditation_integration.Meditation page ?constellation=aries: PASS - auto-switches to Cosmic Meditations mode
constellation_meditation_integration.Star Chart Meditate button: CODE VERIFIED - exists at data-testid='constellation-meditate-btn', navigates to /meditation?constellation={id}

regression_tests.Avatar energy state panel: PASS - dashboard shows streak, mood logs, journal, games
